mapper.sql: id, source_file_id, source_id, source_path, table_name, sheet_name, format, header_row_number, row_count, column_count, metadata_json::text as metadata_json
id, table_id, row_number, row_text, metadata_json::text as metadata_json
id, table_id, row_id, row_number, column_index, column_name, cell_value, normalized_value, value_type, metadata_json::text as metadata_json
mapper.select: insert into structured_tables ( source_file_id, source_id, source_path, table_name, sheet_name, format, header_row_number, row_count, column_count, metadata_json, source_path_norm, search_tsv ) values ( #{record.sourceFileId}, #{record.sourceId}, #{record.sourcePath}, #{record.tableName}, #{record.sheetName}, #{record.format}, #{record.headerRowNumber}, #{record.rowCount}, #{record.columnCount}, #{record.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{sourcePathNorm}, to_tsvector('simple'::regconfig, #{searchText}) ) returning id

insert into structured_table_rows ( table_id, row_number, row_text, metadata_json, search_tsv ) values ( #{record.tableId}, #{record.rowNumber}, #{record.rowText}, #{record.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, to_tsvector('simple'::regconfig, #{searchText}) ) returning id
mapper.insert: insert into structured_table_cells ( table_id, row_id, row_number, column_index, column_name, cell_value, normalized_value, value_type, metadata_json, column_name_norm, search_tsv ) values ( #{record.tableId}, #{record.rowId}, #{record.rowNumber}, #{record.columnIndex}, #{record.columnName}, #{record.cellValue}, #{record.normalizedValue}, #{record.valueType}, #{record.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{columnNameNorm}, to_tsvector('simple'::regconfig, #{searchText}) )
mapper.select: select from structured_tables where source_file_id = #{sourceFileId} order by id asc
select from structured_table_rows where table_id = #{tableId} order by row_number asc, id asc
select from structured_table_cells where table_id = #{tableId} order by row_number asc, column_index asc, id asc

select stc.id, stc.table_id, stc.row_id, stc.row_number, stc.column_index, stc.column_name, stc.cell_value, stc.normalized_value, stc.value_type, stc.metadata_json::text as metadata_json from structured_table_cells stc join structured_tables st on st.id = stc.table_id where st.source_file_id = #{sourceFileId} and lower(stc.column_name) = lower(#{columnName}) and stc.normalized_value = #{normalizedValue} order by st.table_name asc, stc.row_number asc, stc.column_index asc
